name: My back started hurting days after lifting heavy boxes at work in Ogden, is it too late to file?
description: Report within 180 days in Utah even for delayed pain; tell doctor work details for proper reporting.[1]

mainEntity.name: My back started hurting days after lifting heavy boxes at work in Ogden, is it too late to file?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report within 180 days in Utah even for delayed pain; tell doctor work details for proper reporting.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, report it within 180 days in Utah to qualify for benefits; delayed symptoms can still be compensable if work-related.[1] Explain the full context to your doctor for their report (Form 123).[1] Key factors: Employer reports to insurer in 7 days; you get rights form (Form 100); failure to report timely disqualifies benefits.[1] Document everything, get treated promptly, and notify supervisor in writing.[1] A lawyer can help prove causation if disputed.[1]
